_schema: Each role entry customizes the master templates. Only include fields that DIFFER from candidate.json defaults.

roles.title: Partner Solutions Architect
roles.summary_override: Claude Certified Architect and AI transformation leader with 15+ years of enterprise consulting experience, now building production agentic AI systems on Claude and MCP architecture. Proven 75% pilot-to-production conversion rate across Fortune 500 engagements. Designed and deployed financial AI agents on Claude before Anthropic's financial services launch.
roles.competencies_override: Claude Architecture | Model Context Protocol (MCP) | Agentic AI Systems | Enterprise AI Deployment | Pilot-to-Production Strategy | AI Center of Excellence Design | LLM Evaluation | RAG Architecture | Multi-Agent Systems | Financial AI Applications | Production AI Operations | Technical Solution Design | Stakeholder & Executive Communication

cover_letter_hooks.opener: I build production AI systems on Claude. Not proofs of concept. Not slide decks about what Claude could do. Deployed, running, revenue-generating systems.
why_fit: Built Enso Trading Terminal on Claude + MCP before Anthropic's financial services push
Designed AI pipeline processing 731 documents with 16 validated signals for Fortune 500 manufacturer
15 years at McCann, Omnicom/DDB, RAPP, BBDO managing $150MM+ for Citi, JPMorgan, Google, Microsoft
Hold Claude Certified Architect credential and attended Anthropic Financial Services Briefing
cover_letter_hooks.closer: The enterprise AI deployment problem is an architecture problem. I've been solving it on Claude specifically.

roles.title: Manager, Applied AI in AI Architecture

cover_letter_hooks.opener: I've spent the last several years building production AI systems on Claude — not evaluating them from a distance, but architecting, deploying, and maintaining them for Fortune 500 enterprises.
why_fit: CCA credential holder building production Claude + MCP systems daily
75% pilot-to-production conversion across enterprise engagements
Multi-agent orchestration and RAG pipelines in live production environments
AI Center of Excellence design for pharma agency (Heller)
cover_letter_hooks.closer: I want to help define what applied AI architecture looks like inside Anthropic.

roles.title: Director, Technology Strategy
roles.summary_override: Google Gemini-certified AI strategist and transformation leader with 15+ years bridging enterprise technology strategy and production AI deployment. Built agentic AI systems processing live market data, orchestrating multi-agent workflows, and delivering measurable enterprise outcomes.
roles.competencies_override: AI/ML Strategy | Agentic AI Systems | Enterprise Technology Planning | Multi-Agent Orchestration | LLM Evaluation & Deployment | RAG Architecture | Production AI Operations | Financial AI Applications | Stakeholder Management | Cross-functional Leadership | Data-Driven Decision Making

cover_letter_hooks.opener: I've spent the last several years at the intersection of enterprise technology strategy and production AI deployment — exactly where this role sits.
why_fit: Google Gemini Professional Certificate holder with hands-on agentic AI architecture
Built production trading intelligence on multi-agent orchestration
15 years leading strategy across Google, Microsoft, T-Mobile, Citi at top agencies
75% pilot-to-production rate translating AI vision into measurable enterprise outcomes
cover_letter_hooks.closer: DeepMind's technology strategy needs people who have shipped production AI, not just theorized about it.

roles.title: Director, Product Management — Gemini Agentic Capabilities

cover_letter_hooks.opener: I build agentic AI systems that run in production. The Enso Trading Terminal processes live market data through autonomous agent workflows — and it's been live for months.
why_fit: Google Gemini cert + production agentic systems builder
Multi-agent orchestration with tool use, context management, human-in-the-loop
Enterprise deployment: 75% pilot-to-production, 3-month time-to-value
731-document intelligence pipeline with validated commercial signals
cover_letter_hooks.closer: Gemini's agentic capabilities need product leaders who've built and shipped these systems, not just managed roadmaps about them.

cover_letter_hooks.opener: I've spent the last several years building AI applications that people actually use in production — from trading intelligence to market research to enterprise workflow automation.
why_fit: Production AI applications with real users and measurable business impact
83% reduction in campaign timelines through agentic automation
150%+ revenue growth delivered for Fortune 500 through AI enablement
Google Gemini certified with deep multi-platform AI experience
cover_letter_hooks.closer: DeepMind's AI applications need product leaders who understand the full journey from model capability to user value.

Managed $150MM+ portfolio across financial services, technology, and healthcare. Proven ability to translate AI capabilities into executive-level value propositions that drive enterprise adoption.

cover_letter_hooks.opener: I've spent 15 years in the room with C-suite executives at Citi, JPMorgan Chase, Google, Microsoft, and Pfizer — not presenting decks, but building the strategic partnerships that drive enterprise technology adoption.
why_fit: $150MM+ portfolio management across Fortune 500 C-suite relationships
75% pilot-to-production: translating AI vision into executive-approved deployments
Built financial AI trading terminal — production proof of enterprise AI deployment
Agency pedigree: McCann, Omnicom, RAPP, Publicis — enterprise relationship architecture
cover_letter_hooks.closer: Enterprise AI adoption is an executive trust problem. I've been solving it for 15 years.

cover_letter_hooks.opener: I build the partnerships that turn AI platforms into enterprise infrastructure. $150MM+ in client portfolio management, C-suite relationships at Citi, JPMorgan, Google, and Microsoft.
why_fit: Strategic partnership architecture across Fortune 500 accounts

cover_letter_hooks.opener: I build AI solutions that run in production. Not demos. Not pilots that stall. Deployed systems generating measurable business value.

75% pilot-to-production across enterprise engagements
RAG architecture, multi-agent orchestration, LLM evaluation in live environments

Production AI deployment: 75% pilot-to-production, 3-month time-to-value
